body_html:
Dear JEFFREY EPSTEIN,

Don't miss your chance to enjoy over 170 channels including commercial-free music, exclusive live performances, every MLB© game and more.

*Offer expires 9/30/08 while supplies last. Nonrefundable prepayment of three (3) months of service required, and service will renew on quarterly payment terms after initial three (3) months. Subject to $100 early cancellation fee if twelve (12) months of continuous service is not maintained. You must be authorized to redeem this offer. Exclusive offer cannot be combined with other offers, and is only valid in the 48 contiguous United States. Other fees and programming subject to change. Games subject to availability and change. Subscription subject to Customer Agreement available at xmradio.com. XM service only available in the 48 contiguous United States. NHL.com is the official Web site of the National Hockey League.
